questionHtml: List two variables, other than species richness, that can be monitored over time to provide evidence of biodiversity loss in dipterocarp forests.
markschemeHtml:
1. area occupied by forest
    OR
    area of forest that has been lost;  
  2. population size/number of individuals of each species/evenness;   
  3. range of a species
    OR
    the area over which a species is found;  
  4. number of threatened species;

meta.title: List two variables, other than species richness, that can be monitored over time to provide evidence of biodiversity loss in dipterocarp forests.
breadcrumbLabels: A4.2.5. Evidence for a biodiversity crisis
